column1: 規則に照らして、この行為は問題ない。
column2: きそくにてらして、このこういはもんだいない。
column3: Measured against the rules, this action is not a problem.
column4: に照らして・に照らすと (in light of, measured against, judged by the standard of)

column6: evaluates something against a standard, rule, or reference point
column8: に照らして = evaluated against standard; に基づいて = based on foundation; に則して = in accordance with rules; からすると = judging from overall picture
